title: poa keysseri subsp. brassii
intro: Poa keysseri subsp. brassii, also known as the Keysser's fescue grass, is a subspecies of grass belonging to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Poa keysseri subsp. brassii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide antioxidant protection, making it a valuable resource for treating various health conditions. Traditionally, this plant has been prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, from skin conditions to respiratory problems, and its extracts have also been studied for their potential use in pharmaceutical applications.
